steps.t: The stolen rations can likely be found hidden somewhere in Stangard. You should try to recover the stolen rations for Byrnstan, so that he does not go…
The stolen rations are in the kennels of Stangard. Someone in Stangard stole rations from the lock-house; this food should be recovered, and the thief…
Byrnstan can be found guarding the door to the Mead Hall. You should plead Athulf's cause to Byrnstan.
Gadda can be found near the Mead Hall in Stangard. You should speak with Gadda about the food being so scarce that it drives men to steal.
